creator: cperciva@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Looking up portsnap.FreeBSD.org mirrors... none found.

Do you have some weird DNS problems?  What does `host -t srv _http._tcp.portsnap.freebsd.org` say for you?

> fetch: http://portsnap.FreeBSD.org/s/17582da0898897c9fb129f189e67806c69f8d6a0fac6addd6c0cbf33c6458c2c.tgz: Not Found

I'm not 100% certain since your DNS issues mean that I'm not sure which mirror you're hitting, but I suspect that you're running into a glitch caused when a mirror got overloaded by people upgrading to 11.0-RELEASE and crashed with some filesystem corruption resulting.  This should be fixed soon; in the mean time, try pointing portsnap at ec2-eu-west-1.portsnap.freebsd.org.
